svg.title: UML Class Diagram — Server
svg.desc: Server-side classes: GameServer, WebSocketServer, GameServerHandler, MatchManager, MatchSession, LobbyService, AuthRegistry, SessionRegistry, ClientSession, BotController, ChatRouter, ProfanityFilter.
svg.text: Netty edge · session registry · match orchestration · chat · bots · auth
ScheduledExecutorService in MatchManager · 20 Hz · drains MatchSession.tick(dt) on one pool.
Backpressure: if a tick > 50 ms, next tick is skipped and a warning logged.
BotController.stepTick() and ClientSession.send() run on the same loop.
Stateless across pods — match-id is sticky at the load balancer.
Composition = filled diamond on owner · Inheritance = hollow triangle on parent · Pink = runtime · Amber = persistence · Gold dashed = interface.
